texto: I think of the memory as being rather like a dam," he said, after a pause for thought. "It irrigates and gives life to our whole spirit. But, like a dam, it needs overflow channels if it's not to burst its banks. Because if it ever does overflow or burst, its waters will destroy everything in its path.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Bernardo Atxaga: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “I think of the memory as being rather like a dam," he said, after a pause for thought. "It irriga…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, memory, overflow pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
